summary:
There are currently no known educational models dedicated to teaching or practicing retroperitoneoscopic nephrectomy based on available medical literature. The existing resources focus primarily on other minimally invasive kidney procedures rather than this particular technique. 

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$
